description: Clean web reader for AI agents. Pays $0.002/call in USDC on Base via x402. No API keys.
name: io.github.JessieJanie/skim402

environmentVariables.description: Base-network wallet private key (0x-prefixed, 64 hex chars). Fund the wallet with a small amount of USDC on Base to pay $0.002 per call. Create one at https://app.coinbase.com or any Base-compatible wallet.
environmentVariables.name: SKIM_WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional cap on per-call price in USD (default 0.01). Requests that would cost more than this are rejected without payment.
environmentVariables.name: SKIM_MAX_PRICE_USD
